speaker: charlie
text: G'day, I'm Alex Mercer and welcome to your Tuesday ParkSyde Bright Side bulletin. Joining me this morning is the ever-upbeat Jamie.

speaker: alice
text: Hey Alex, beautiful Tuesday morning here in southeast Queensland! The sun's shining, the birds are singing, and we've got some absolutely brilliant news to share today.

speaker: charlie
text: Too right, Jamie. From ocean cleanup milestones to medical breakthroughs, today's stories are proper inspiring. Let's kick off with some green gold.
